The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
verses.text: Cyril, the bishop of the Church of Alexandria, said: As this letter of the most reverend and pious Capreolus, bishop of Carthage, which has been read, contains a most lucid expression of opinion, let it be inserted in the Acts.

verses.book: The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
verses.text: For it wishes that the ancient dogmas of the faith should be confirmed, and that novelties, absurdly conceived and impiously brought forth, should be reprobated and proscribed.

verses.book: The Third Ecumenical Council: The Council of Ephesus.
verses.text: All the bishops at the same time cried out: These are the sentiments (φωναί) of all of us, these are the things we all say—the accomplishment of this is the desire of us all.
